notes: Implemented thin onboarding status screen using createOnboardingClient().status(tenantId), which calls GET /api/onboarding/status/:tenantId.
Screen now renders loading and error states.
Rendered required fields: tenant_id, onboarding_status, provisioning_status.
Rendered optional fields only when present: repair_status, next_step, latest_message.
No backend or contract redesign performed.
